title: adapter/render templates (board.html.tmpl + tree.html.tmpl + summary.html.tmpl)
acceptance_criteria: Board: kanban columns by status, cards grouped by epic, color-coded by priority.
Tree: collapsible project → epic → story → subtask with status pills + completion percentages.
Summary: per-project progress bars, completion velocity from events, blocked-task callouts, agent activity feed.
All views read-only and client-rendered with vanilla JS.
